# ArkClaw 2026: ByteDance's Zero-Setup Cloud AI Agent That Turns OpenClaw Into 24/7 Automation

ArkClaw 2026: ByteDance's Zero-Setup Cloud AI Agent That Turns OpenClaw Into 24/7 Automation

## Key Takeaways

## What Is ArkClaw?

ArkClaw represents Volcengine's direct response to the explosive growth of autonomous AI agents. Officially defined as the cloud-based SaaS version of OpenClaw (codenamed "Lobster"), it provides instant access to a proactive personal AI assistant without any local infrastructure. [...] ## Key Features and Capabilities

ArkClaw extends OpenClaw's strengths with cloud-native enhancements:

## How ArkClaw Works: Technical Breakdown

At its core, ArkClaw provisions a private ECS instance pre-loaded with OpenClaw. Users interact via the Volcengine console or integrated messaging channels. The system routes queries through subscribed models while maintaining full context and memory across sessions.

Benchmarks indicate token efficiency improves dramatically because usage ties to flat Coding Plan allowances rather than pay-per-token. Session stability eliminates the crashes common in local setups during long-running automations. Terminal-cloud hybrid mode allows local file editing with cloud-powered optimization before syncing results back. [...] ## Conclusion

ArkClaw marks a pivotal shift in AI agent accessibility, transforming OpenClaw from a powerful but setup-heavy open-source project into a production-ready platform for developers, professionals, and teams. Its combination of zero-configuration deployment, native ByteDance ecosystem integrations, and generous usage allowances positions it as the most practical path to 24/7 autonomous assistance in 2026.

Ready to experience always-on AI automation? Subscribe to the Volcengine Ark Coding Plan and deploy your ArkClaw instance today at the official experience center.

aibase

Volcano Engine announced on March 9, 2026, the official launch of ArkClaw, a ready-to-use cloud SaaS version of the OpenClaw platform, designed to address core challenges faced by AI Agents in practical applications, such as complex environmental configurations, excessive token consumption, and unstable session states. As a system-level execution tool, ArkClaw provides 7×24-hour online AI assistant services, marking a significant step forward in moving production-grade Agent tasks from complex developer environments to low-barrier commercial applications. [...] ### Related Recommendations

## Cloud Version of OpenClaw! ByteDance's Volcano Engine Launches ArkClaw, No Configuration Needed, Ready to Use Out of the Box

Volcano Engine launches ArkClaw, solving the challenges of deploying AI Agents. As a SaaS version of OpenClaw on the cloud, it webizes the capabilities of top open-source Agent frameworks. Users don't need to configure environments, purchase computing power, or manage APIs; they can access a 24-hour online AI automation machine by simply opening a webpage, simplifying the process of using powerful AI features.

Additionally, the official plans to hold offline events in seven cities including Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, and Shenzhen this Thursday to further promote its Agent building ecosystem. The launch of ArkClaw not only simplifies the deployment process of Agents but also reduces the friction cost of advanced models entering production processes through cloud engineering methods, indicating that AI applications will accelerate their generational shift from single conversations to complex task automation.

contents.content:
Title: ArkClaw Review: ByteDance's Cloud SaaS Service, Is It Really Worth Using?

URL Source: https://openclawai.net/blog/arkclaw-review

Markdown Content:
OpenClaw is on fire. With 280,000 stars on GitHub, almost everyone in content creation, development, and automation is talking about it. But the barrier to local deployment has deterred many: Docker pull failures, the process dying after tokens run out, or waking up to find midnight scheduled tasks didn't execute at all.

On March 9, 2026, ByteDance's Volcano Engine officially launched ArkClaw, essentially the official cloud SaaS version of OpenClaw. Its core promise is just one sentence: "You just focus on your tasks, we'll handle the operation and maintenance."

I spent a few days using it. Here is my true feeling to help you judge whether it's worth subscribing.

* * *

What is ArkClaw? How does it differ from local OpenClaw?
--------------------------------------------------------

ArkClaw is a managed service launched by Volcano Engine based on the OpenClaw open-source project. You don't need to spin up a server, configure environment variables, or keep an eye on your Token balance—just log in to the Volcano Ark platform, click "Create Now," and in under a minute, a 7x24 online exclusive AI assistant is running.

AI Tools, Chatbots & Virtual Assistants

Compared with local deployment, the differences are mainly in three aspects:

Stability: ArkClaw allocates exclusive ECS resources for each user, so processes won't interrupt due to PC shutdown or network instability. Common issues in local deployment like missed scheduled tasks or lost conversation context basically don't exist here.

Token Anxiety: After subscribing to the Volcano Ark Coding Plan, using the Doubao model series requires no extra Token billing, which is a highly practical advantage for frequent users.

Zero Maintenance: Skill updates, system upgrades, and security patches are all automatically handled in the background by Volcano Engine. The only thing you need to do is open the chat dialog.

* * *

Core Features of ArkClaw
------------------------

### Seamless Multi-Model Switching

ArkClaw recommends Doubao-Seed-2.0 by default, which performs stably on complex long texts and multi-round reasoning. It's also compatible with mainstream models like Kimi 2.5, MiniMax 2.5, and GLM. You can enable "Auto" intelligent dispatch, where the system automatically chooses the most suitable model based on the task type.

For users who dread "model selection paralysis", Auto mode is a worry-free choice.

### Deep Feishu (Lark) Integration (The Biggest Highlight)

Among all cloud "Claw" products, ArkClaw offers the most complete Feishu integration. It's not just messaging, but genuine read and write operations:

*   Create and edit Feishu documents
*   Add/delete rows and query data in multidimensional spreadsheets
*   Pull meeting minutes and auto-extract action items
*   Set schedule reminders and routinely push summaries to Feishu direct chats or groups

Configuration takes about 10 minutes: create a custom app bot in the Feishu open platform, fill the App ID and App Secret into ArkClaw's "Message Channel" settings, enable Long Connection Event Subscription, and bind using a pairing code.

After configuration, you can use it directly by chatting privately with the bot within Feishu, which is much more efficient than toggling between tools.

> Real Experience: I told it to "summarize this morning's meeting minutes and extract three action items." It directly read the Feishu document and output a structured result without any fluff. For people who primarily work in Feishu, this feature offers high practical value.

### Skills Extension

The built-in skills library covers common scenarios like programming assistance, weekly report generation, document organization, and web page summarization. The ClawHub community also continually updates third-party plugins. It uses conversational installation, meaning no technical background required.

### File Management

Utilizing Volcano Engine's TOS object storage as the file system, it supports uploading local files to the cloud for AI to read and analyze directly. For users who need to handle a large payload of documents (like content creators and researchers), this feature saves plenty of manual copy-pasting text.

AI API keys

* * *

Pricing Details?
----------------

ArkClaw requires a subscription to the Volcano Ark Coding Plan:

| Plan | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Lite Plan | Free 7-day trial |
| Pro Plan | Starts from as low as ¥8.9 for the first month, full features included (subject to official site) |

One crucial point to note: After expiration, the ArkClaw instance will be deleted, and data is only retained for 24 hours. If you decide not to renew, make sure to back up vital chat logs and files before the expiration date.

* * *

Limitations and Caveats
-----------------------

Before starting, here are some practical issues you should know:

Sub-account permissions: If you are using an enterprise sub-account, an administrator needs to grant prior IAM-related permissions (iam:CreateRole, iam:GetRole, etc.), otherwise the instance creation will fail. Personal accounts don't have this issue.

Feishu integration requires admin permissions: When creating a custom Feishu application, you need the enterprise admin role. Regular employee accounts cannot complete this step independently and require IT coordination.

Mobile Web Not Supported Yet: ArkClaw's web interface is currently PC-only. Though if you've configured the Feishu channel, chatting directly via the Feishu App works fine.

OpenClaw Open Source License: The underlying ArkClaw relies on the OpenClaw open-source project. When using Skills, please abide by the corresponding open-source licenses and bear the risks yourself.

* * *

Who is ArkClaw for?
-------------------

Based on hands-on experience, the following users will find the most notable value:

*   Heavy Feishu users: From meeting minutes to document generation and table management, essentially a one-stop solution.
*   Content Creators: Automated scheduled tasks, asset organization, and weekly report generation, cutting repetitive labor.
*   Developers: The solid performance of Doubao-Seed-2.0 in coding scenarios combined with extensive Skills scalability.
*   People who hate DevOps: Paying a few bucks to bypass all local deployment hassles is well worth it for this group.

If you are a local deployment enthusiast, strictly demand data privatization, or mainly use DingTalk/WeCom rather than Feishu, ArkClaw's advantages are somewhat limited at the moment, so you may prefer to wait and see.

* * *

How to Try ArkClaw?
-------------------

1.   Open the trial portal: (PC only)
2.   Log in to Volcano Ark Platform. Coding Plan users can trial it for free directly.
3.   Left menu → Agent → ArkClaw → Create Now
4.   Once created, enter the chat page to configure message channels and Skills

Official Document:

* * *

Final Verdict
-------------

What ArkClaw does is simple: it resolves all the annoying hassles of local OpenClaw deployment, letting you focus solely on "using" it.

Machine Learning & Artificial Intelligence

It's neither the cheapest solution nor the one with the most features. But if what you care about is stability, hassle-free use, and seamless Feishu integration, then among all current cloud Claw products, ArkClaw offers the closest "out-of-the-box" experience.

With a 7-day free trial and no risks involved, it's worth taking for a spin.

Cloud Version of OpenClaw! ByteDance's Volcano Engine Launches ArkClaw, No Configuration Needed, Ready to Use Out of the Box
============================================================================================================================

![Image 2: aibase](https://app.aibase.com/icon/logo.png)

#### AIbase基地

Published in[AI News](https://www.aibase.com/news) · 6 min read · Mar 9, 2026

67

In the AI circle, there has always been a "fish and bear's paw" dilemma: deploying powerful agents is too difficult, while web-based chat interfaces are too weak.

Until recently, Volc Engine officially launched **ArkClaw**. It is codenamed "Lobster" and is officially defined as a **"cloud-based SaaS version of OpenClaw."**

Simply put: it turns the capabilities of top-tier open-source agent frameworks into a "web version." **No need to set up environments, no need to buy computing power, no need to manage APIs — just open a webpage and instantly have a 24/7 online AI automator.**

![Image 3: image.png](https://upload.chinaz.com/2026/0309/6390866956787365029352383.png)

I. What is ArkClaw?
-------------------

### Your cloud-based AI "second-in-command"

**ArkClaw** is the new generation large model application platform launched by Volc Engine. Its core logic is no longer simply "Q&A," but rather **"execution."**

*   **Full model coverage**: Not only does it launch support for the **Doubao-Seed-2.0 series**, but it also integrates mainstream models across the network such as Kimi2.5, MiniMax2.5, and GLM.

*   **7×24h non-stop**: Since it runs on the cloud of Volc Engine, even if you close your computer, it continues to run tasks and monitor data in the background.

*   **Ready to use out of the box**: Compared to the hours of trouble involved in manually deploying OpenClaw, ArkClaw achieves **instant activation**.

II. Core Black Technology: Why is it stronger than regular AI?
--------------------------------------------------------------

### 1. Exclusive Feishu Deep Integration: The Top of Office Automation

This is the most powerful scenario of ArkClaw. It can directly become a Feishu robot, not only chatting, but also:

*   **Multi-dimensional table expert**: Let it analyze table data with one sentence, automatically generate summaries and reports.

*   **Meeting minutes manager**: Automatically identify voice-to-text content, extract action items and set reminders.

*   **Permission penetration**: No more tedious context copying; it can directly "understand" your workflow in Feishu.

### 2. 10,000+ Skill Ecosystem (ClawHub)

ArkClaw is not alone. It connects to a vast **ClawHub** skill library, allowing you to add skills like installing apps on your phone:

*   **Web collection (Agent Reach)**: Scrape hot topics, GitHub updates, or competitor information from the entire web.

*   **Office all-round (Office-Automation)**: Batch process PDFs, Word, and Excel files, solving tedious tasks with one click.

*   **Self-improving**: It records your habits and preferences, becoming more like your personal assistant the more you use it.

### 3. Terminal-cloud integration: Breaking the boundaries of storage and computing power

It supports smooth data transfer between local devices. You can synchronize code or documents written locally to the cloud using **TOS cloud disk tool**, letting ArkClaw on the cloud optimize and restructure them with powerful computing power, then seamlessly return the results.

III. Who Needs ArkClaw Most?
----------------------------

**User Groups****The Ultimate Reason to Use ArkClaw**
**Office workers**Get rid of low-efficiency tasks like weekly reports, meeting minutes, and data summaries.
**Developers/Programmers**Combined with **Coding Plan**, gain several times more token usage than Claude Max.
**Content creators**Search for materials, rewrite, and polish content, making one person act like an entire company.
**Independent teams**Build your own enterprise-level AI assistant at low cost without maintaining servers.

IV. Generous "Ride-on" Pricing
------------------------------

Volc Engine not only delivered solid technology this time but also completely "turned the table" on pricing:

![Image 4: image.png](https://upload.chinaz.com/2026/0309/6390866959024632347438183.png)

*   **Coding Plan Lite**: Only **¥9.9** for the first month, plus an additional **7-day free trial of ArkClaw**.

*   **Coding Plan Pro**: Enjoy **permanent free usage of ArkClaw** during the subscription period.

> **Tip**: Pro users get several times more model usage than Claude Pro. For users with high-frequency needs, this is almost the most cost-effective option on the market.

👉 Attached is the **Official Experience Entry for Volc Engine ArkClaw: (https://console.volcengine.com/ark/region:ark+cn-beijing/experience/claw?)**

Title: Volc Engine Launches ArkClaw: The Cloud SaaS Version of OpenClaw is Officially Launched, Integrated with Doubao Large Model

URL Source: https://news.aibase.com/news/26042

Markdown Content:
Volcano Engine announced on March 9, 2026, the official launch of ArkClaw, a ready-to-use cloud SaaS version of the OpenClaw platform, designed to address core challenges faced by AI Agents in practical applications, such as complex environmental configurations, excessive token consumption, and unstable session states. As a system-level execution tool, ArkClaw provides 7×24-hour online AI assistant services, marking a significant step forward in moving production-grade Agent tasks from complex developer environments to low-barrier commercial applications.

In terms of technical ecosystems, ArkClaw deeply integrates the "Volcano Ark" model platform, natively collaborating with mainstream large models such as Doubao-Seed-2.0 series, Kimi2.5, MiniMax2.5, and GLM. Particularly when working with Doubao-Seed2.0Pro for complex tasks, it demonstrates remarkable logical consistency.

In terms of functionality, the product is deeply adapted to Feishu office suites, supporting schedule booking, multi-dimensional table management, and complex document generation, and is compatible with both LUI and Terminal modes. For data security needs, ArkClaw has an internal Skills security scanning mechanism and direct connection to cloud storage for long-term data retention, ensuring reliability for enterprise-level applications.

![Image 1: QQ20260309-150029.jpg](https://upload.chinaz.com/2026/0309/6390866524367814779828058.jpg)

Currently, Volcano Engine has opened up early access for "Coding Plan" subscription users: Pro plan users can directly synchronize usage, while Lite plan users enjoy a 7-day free trial period. Additionally, the official plans to hold offline events in seven cities including Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, and Shenzhen this Thursday to further promote its Agent building ecosystem. The launch of ArkClaw not only simplifies the deployment process of Agents but also reduces the friction cost of advanced models entering production processes through cloud engineering methods, indicating that AI applications will accelerate their generational shift from single conversations to complex task automation.
